testcase.name: test_get_welders

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 3 active welders assert 0 >= 3 + where 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d52b000>('welders', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d52b000> = {'items': [{'active_quals': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': '', 'expired_quals': 0, ...}, {'active_quals': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': 'luca.verdi@azienda.it', 'expired_quals': 1, ...}, {'active_quals': 1, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': 'marco.bianchi@azienda.it', 'expired_quals': 0, ...}], 'stats': {'active_welders': 3, 'expired': 1, 'no_qual': 1, 'ok': 0, ...}, 'total': 3}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration95_stabilization.py:301: in test_get_welders assert len(data.get("welders", [])) >= 3, "Should have at least 3 active welders" E AssertionError: Should have at least 3 active welders E assert 0 >= 3 E + where 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d52b000>('welders', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d52b000> = {'items': [{'active_quals': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': '', 'expired_quals': 0, ...}, {'active_quals': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': 'luca.verdi@azienda.it', 'expired_quals': 1, ...}, {'active_quals': 1, 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:48:37.127939+00:00', 'email': 'marco.bianchi@azienda.it', 'expired_quals': 0, ...}], 'stats': {'active_welders': 3, 'expired': 1, 'no_qual': 1, 'ok': 0, ...}, 'total': 3}.get

testcase.name: test_get_instruments

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 5 instruments assert 0 >= 5 + where 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d187f00>('instruments', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d187f00> = {'items': [{'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'attivo', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.752155+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 275, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'in_manutenzione', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:13.112414+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': None, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'attivo', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:13.274198+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 245, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'scaduto', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.993964+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': -45, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 6, 'computed_status': 'in_scadenza', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.882288+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 14, ...}], 'stats': {'attivi': 2, 'fuori_uso': 0, 'in_manutenzione': 1, 'in_scadenza': 1, ...}, 'total': 5}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration95_stabilization.py:309: in test_get_instruments assert len(data.get("instruments", [])) >= 5, "Should have at least 5 instruments" E AssertionError: Should have at least 5 instruments E assert 0 >= 5 E + where 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d187f00>('instruments', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfba81d187f00> = {'items': [{'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'attivo', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.752155+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 275, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'in_manutenzione', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:13.112414+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': None, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'attivo', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:13.274198+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 245, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 12, 'computed_status': 'scaduto', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.993964+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': -45, ...}, {'calibration_interval_months': 6, 'computed_status': 'in_scadenza', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T18:30:12.882288+00:00', 'days_until_expiry': 14, ...}], 'stats': {'attivi': 2, 'fuori_uso': 0, 'in_manutenzione': 1, 'in_scadenza': 1, ...}, 'total': 5}.get
